Text: We ordered a meal for one person for 1500 sum, and we also ordered rice and another salad from the chef, but it turned out to be very salty without our consent.

These prices at this place are democratic: a cup of tea costs 200 sum, Nemiroff vodka costs 80 sum/800 rubles, a glass of wine (I don't remember which one)-150 sum, Kent cigarettes with a lighter-100 sum, cheese (some kind of Belarusian, very tasty)-150 sum (the portion is actually 130 sum), the total bill for three people with alcohol was 1470 sum plus tea.
Always keep your expectations high - salads are always fresh with new ingredients, very tasty khachapuri, and highly praised lagman.
The staff was very respectful and polite, starting with the hostess lady and ending with several waiters.
It's the same as three years ago, nothing new, just pizza and pasta.
However, it is necessary to introduce new dishes at least once so that young people can try them and for older people to have some interest in tasting new dishes.
Actually, there's plenty of space for luggage, the interior is very comfortable!
Very attentive servers and administrators.
Somehow, I didn't feel like doing the service work. It started off well enough (if you ask me, it was crowded with people), but later on, some of the performers didn't even start their shows.
First of all, thank you to the chef for the "Tower" steak, it was very tasty, secondly, I had a craving for it.
The portion is really good!
Although it might be possible to make them more comfortable, they are mostly 'homey', like us.
The interior is not fancy, just clean and cozy, with lively music in the hall, but we were there without special music.
Risky choice, but the dessert - Napoleon, very sweet.
Administrator Victoria is currently creating the menu, taking into account all our preferences, and arranging the banquet with enthusiasm.
It was very late because the girl (see above) entertained the guests.
Risk is always present.
it's a very spicy caesar salad, seasoned with habit.
The service was terrible, the waitresses were great but only until after the bill, they only laughed at us, everything was cleaned up without our permission!
We will serve you at our restaurant meetings.

Caesar salads are made from the following components: 4 croutons cut from white bread (or regular bread), lettuce leaves, and one egg mixed with anchovy paste, four large anchovies, and parmesan cheese sprinkled on top, right?
The menu really forces you to choose dishes, but it's not a reason for choosing, rather I ended up trying many things.
Very hot food.
The interior design is very bright and pleasant.

I don't like shashlik made from white meat, but I was pleasantly surprised when they were opened, and the menu exceeded my expectations! I tried a piece of pork belly - it was tender, juicy, and had a perfect balance of flavors, unlike anything I've had before! The Caesar salad was also the best version I've ever tasted (and I rarely eat Caesar salads!), and the kvass was delicious too. Everything we ordered arrived on time, and we even asked for an extra portion of pork belly, which they happily provided. Thank you!
I find the restaurant opposite my friend's place too expensive and fancy, but the atmosphere inside is nice, with tables under trees and fresh air around it.
Many years ago we provided service at a very high level.
It's very spicy - they put the skewers in salt water and add lemon for the chicken: I will take the chicken skewers to my friends.
What a great restaurant!
All my guests were treated with great respect, everyone who opened the steak with enthusiasm was heartwarming :)
A complaint about customer service at the "Troika" restaurant.
Of course, I couldn't tell you exactly! For her sake, I'll just say around eleven...ten past! That is, much later than expected!
Both locals and tourists (without Japanese-style bowing, please), repeat customers, those who enjoy the atmosphere, and those who appreciate the lake view should be accommodated.
They serve the dishes very quickly, the waiter answers every question professionally.
With spinach: the halibut was very tasty, we didn't manage to finish the whole halibut, the salad made with pickled vegetables was also quite good)) overall it was satisfying, it was nice and cozy.
The food was very tasty, no additives, portions were adequate.
The interior is cozy, the heating is comfortable, the seats are convenient, the music is well-chosen)
A small but pleasant cafe.
The service is good, the staff is friendly, orders are delivered quickly.
